bead.title: model snapshot: expose runtime quota and latency fields
bead.description:
Review of fizeau-7c8b1856/fizeau-491dd1e3 found that KnownModel carries Status only; it lacks quota_remaining and recent p50 latency despite ADR-012 and the epic intent. The fiz models QUOTA column currently prints catalog quota_pool, not runtime quota remaining.

In scope:
- internal/modelregistry KnownModel snapshot fields for runtime quota and recent latency
- assembler join from runtimesignals cache into those fields
- CLI list/detail rendering that distinguishes quota pool from runtime quota remaining
- tests for snapshot and CLI output

Out of scope:
- Routing consumption of snapshot; separate bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. go test ./internal/modelregistry/... -run "Runtime|Quota|Latency|Snapshot" -count=1 passes and asserts runtime quota/latency are present in assembled KnownModel rows.
2. go test ./cmd/fiz -run "TestModelsList.*Quota|TestModelsDetail.*Runtime|TestModelsListDefaultColumns" -count=1 passes and proves fiz models no longer labels quota_pool as runtime quota remaining.
3. go test ./cmd/fiz/... ./internal/modelregistry/... -count=1 passes.
